# SOUL.md — align references to AI plans/ rename (lines 11 + 27) — needs user approval

Per D-20260419-013 + parallel-session Run 196 follow-up promise.

SOUL.md lines 11 + 27 still reference `plans/main-plan.md`. SOUL.md cannot be edited without explicit user approval per CLAUDE.md §5 guardrails.

## Goal
Update SOUL.md refs from `plans/main-plan.md` → `AI plans/main-plan.md` once user approves.

## AC
- [ ] User comments approval on this Issue.
- [ ] SOUL.md lines 11 + 27 updated in a single small PR.
- [ ] Referenced by D-YYYYMMDD-### in decision-log.

## Notes
